# Rockfort Stay Inn

> Luxury service apartments in Hirondini Park, Oragadam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India.

Rockfort Stay Inn offers premium fully-furnished service apartments for short stays, long stays, and corporate accommodations. Located at Hirondini Park, Oragadam, Chennai — near major IT parks and SIPCOT.

## Rooms Available

- **Studio Suite** – Ideal for solo travelers and business professionals. King bed, kitchenette, Smart TV, high-speed WiFi.
- **1 Bedroom Suite (1BHK)** – Perfect for couples and medium stays. Separate bedroom, full kitchen, living room, washing machine.
- **2 Bedroom Suite (2BHK)** – Best for families. Two private bedrooms, full kitchen, dining area, two Smart TVs.

## Amenities

High-speed WiFi, Air conditioning (individual control), Smart TV with OTT, Fully equipped kitchen, Washing machine & dryer, 24/7 security & CCTV, Parking, Premium linen, Power backup, Housekeeping, 24/7 guest support.

## Location

Hirondini Park, Oragadam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 602105, India.
Close to: SIPCOT Industrial Park, Oragadam IT Corridor, GST Road, major highways.
